audit_scope: official full DuckDB asset integrity and SE1 source coverage only; this does not materialize staging data or approve identity mappings

asset.storage: private, untracked; raw asset is deliberately excluded from Git

exact_queries.games: SELECT count(*), min(date), max(date) FROM games WHERE competition_id = 'SE1'
exact_queries.historical_clubs: SELECT count(DISTINCT club_id) FROM clubs WHERE domestic_competition_id = 'SE1'
exact_queries.current_2026_clubs: SELECT count(DISTINCT club_id) FROM (SELECT home_club_id AS club_id FROM games WHERE competition_id = 'SE1' AND year(date) = 2026 UNION ALL SELECT away_club_id AS club_id FROM games WHERE competition_id = 'SE1' AND year(date) = 2026)
exact_queries.valuations: SELECT count(*), min(date), max(date) FROM player_valuations WHERE player_club_domestic_competition_id = 'SE1'
exact_queries.lineups: SELECT count(*), min(gl.date), max(gl.date), count(DISTINCT gl.game_id) FROM game_lineups gl JOIN games g ON g.game_id = gl.game_id WHERE g.competition_id = 'SE1'
exact_queries.lineup_types: SELECT type, count(*) FROM game_lineups gl JOIN games g ON g.game_id = gl.game_id WHERE g.competition_id = 'SE1' GROUP BY type ORDER BY type
